response.justification: While Bogdan possesses extensive hands-on engineering experience and a strong background in software craftsmanship, he lacks the executive-level leadership required for a CTO role. There is no evidence of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people, managing external delivery partners, or deep architectural experience in AI-native fintech applications like real-time credit risk or algorithmic working-capital management.
strengths: Strong background in distributed systems, microservices, and high-throughput backend engineering.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Demonstrated dedication to software craftsmanship, TDD, and open-source community building.
concerns: Lacks executive leadership experience and a track record of scaling engineering teams.
No demonstrated domain expertise in algorithmic working-capital management or real-time credit decisioning.
Missing experience in structuring governance frameworks and managing outsourced engineering partners.
